title: Per-model dependency summaries for the core roster (with caveat)
context: Using the DepMap aggregator, the project produces per-model selective-dependency summaries for the authenticated core roster - but only for models whose authentication status is known, and always with the standing not-medical-advice caveat. No therapeutic or 'druggable in patients' claim is permitted. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Produce per-model selective-dependency summaries for the authenticated core roster, each carrying source/version/methodology and the standing caveat.
acceptanceCriteria: Dependency summaries produced only for models whose authentication status is known (depends on misid-010) - never profile a line before its flag.
Each dependency assertion carries source + release version + methodology + the standing 'research observation; not medical advice; not a treatment recommendation' caveat.
No therapeutic/prognostic/'druggable in patients' claim; domain reviewer confirms framing.
Deliverable dataset licensed CC-BY-4.0; validates in CI.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: catalog/dependencies per-model selective-dependency summaries for the core roster (dataset).
